case_title: RAFIQ JONES VS. TA'DARREL E. POSEY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, RAFIQ AS TO DEFENDANT POSEY, TA'DARREL E. AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CALIFORNIA ADVANCE PATROL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, RAFIQ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POSEY, TA'DARREL E. AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CALIFORNIA ADVANCE PATROL $7,249.29 PRINCIPAL, $70.63 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,544.92, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
